title: Wire ScorecardHistory CLI and registry
description: Register the report block and add the direct plexus feedback report scorecard-history command with days and explicit date-window support.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Registered ScorecardHistory in the report block registry and added the direct CLI command: plexus feedback report scorecard-history --scorecard <identifier> [--score <identifier>] with --days or --start-date/--end-date.
